batch.name: Life Kline / World Yi product explainers v1

meta.purpose: First production batch of product and World Yi explanation images after brand pads.

assets.title: 人生K线产品宇宙图
assets.description: 说明测算、报告、工具、知识、案例、复访如何组成完整产品路径。
assets.subject: Life Kline product universe from first birth-data analysis to reports, tools, knowledge, cases and revisits
assets.userQuestion: What can users do after entering Life Kline?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 从测算到行动的完整路径
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 從測算到行動的完整路徑
mustShow: six connected product islands: analysis, report, tools, knowledge, cases, revisit
user journey arrows from first input to deeper custom reports
World Yi method layer underneath the product surfaces
assets.layout: premium product ecosystem map, central cockpit with six connected islands, clear journey arrows, rich but readable structure
assets.altText: 人生K线从测算到报告工具知识案例和复访的产品宇宙图

assets.title: 世界易六步判断法
assets.description: 把世界易的结构、时位、环境、行动、风险、复盘做成总式图。
assets.subject: World Yi six-step reasoning method as a modern Eastern judgment system
assets.userQuestion: How does World Yi make a judgment without deterministic fortune telling?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 结构、时位、环境、行动、风险、复盘
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 結構、時位、環境、行動、風險、複盤
mustShow: classical Yi symbols translated into modern decision panels
assets.layout: doctrine diagram board, six large readable modules around a central judgment compass, arrows and review loop
assets.altText: 世界易结构时位环境行动风险复盘六步判断法

assets.title: 第一份报告阅读路径
assets.description: 说明用户填写生辰后，如何先看第一份报告，再进入深入报告。
assets.subject: First report reading path after user enters birth information
assets.userQuestion: What should a user read first after the first report appears?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 先看重点，再进入深度报告
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 先看重點，再進入深度報告
mustShow: birth information input card flowing into first report
clear CTA path into deeper report
do not show private real personal data
assets.layout: user journey storyboard, left-to-right flow from birth input to first report to deep report, product UI panels and action path
assets.altText: 用户填写生辰后阅读第一份人生K线报告再进入深入报告的路径图

assets.title: 深入报告层级地图
assets.description: 说明深入报告如何从总论进入事业、关系、财富、健康、迁移等细分报告。
assets.subject: Deep report layer map from general life structure to custom topic reports
assets.userQuestion: How does the deep report lead users into specialized reports?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 总论之后，进入你的细分问题
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 總論之後，進入你的細分問題
assets.layout: layered report map, central deep report with six branching gates and staircase depth metaphor
assets.altText: 人生K线深入报告通向事业关系财富健康迁移年度等细分报告的层级地图

assets.title: 120个工具矩阵
assets.description: 说明工具中心如何把报告里的问题拆成单项测算和行动建议。
assets.subject: Life Kline 120-tool matrix connected to report questions and user actions
assets.userQuestion: Why should users use tools after reading a report?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 把大报告拆成可执行的小问题
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 把大報告拆成可執行的小問題
mustShow: matrix of many small tool cards without tiny readable text
report question flowing into selected tools
assets.layout: tool matrix infographic, many icon cards grouped by domain, one highlighted user path from report question to tool result
assets.altText: 人生K线120个工具把报告问题拆成单项测算和行动建议的矩阵图

assets.title: 内容体系地图
assets.description: 说明知识、案例、洞察、图片文章和工具如何互相导流。
assets.subject: Life Kline content system connecting knowledge, cases, insights, images, tools and reports
assets.userQuestion: How does site content help users understand and return?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 知识、案例、洞察，都回到你的判断
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 知識、案例、洞察，都回到你的判斷
mustShow: content hub with knowledge, cases, insights and visual articles
arrows toward analyze page and report page
related reading cards and tool recommendation path
assets.layout: content network map, editorial cards orbit around report and analyze entry, clear route arrows and hierarchy
assets.altText: 人生K线知识案例洞察图片文章工具和报告互相连接的内容体系地图

assets.title: 不是宿命论的判断边界
assets.description: 说明世界易和命理分析只做结构化判断，不做恐吓和决定论。
assets.subject: Boundary between cultural metaphysics education and deterministic fortune telling
assets.userQuestion: Why is Life Kline not fear-based fortune telling?
mustShow: two-side contrast without shaming traditional culture
left side: vague fear fog transformed into structure cards
right side: calm action map and review loop
assets.layout: ethical boundary infographic, mist turns into structured cards and action map, clear but non-confrontational tone
assets.altText: 世界易不做宿命论和恐吓式判断而强调结构行动和验证的边界图

assets.title: 五行现代翻译图
assets.description: 把金木水火土从标签翻译为承载、推动、流动、表达、收束的关系。
assets.subject: Modern translation of five elements relationships for Life Kline reports
assets.userQuestion: How should users understand five elements without turning them into personality labels?
mustShow: modern interpretation cards: growth, expression, carrying, ordering, flowing
avoid saying one element determines destiny
assets.layout: rich five-element education board, large wheel plus modern interpretation cards and action translation layer
assets.altText: 五行金木水火土相生相克与现代判断关系的说明图

assets.title: 生辰与真太阳时说明图
assets.description: 说明出生日期、时间、地点、时区、真太阳时和节气切换如何影响报告。
assets.subject: Birth date, birth time, place, timezone, solar time and solar terms for Bazi report accuracy
assets.userQuestion: Why does the birth information form ask for time and place?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 时间地点，会影响排盘精度
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 時間地點，會影響排盤精度
mustShow: birth information form without real personal data
assets.layout: technical education diagram, form inputs flow into timezone and solar-time correction modules then into report
assets.altText: 生辰日期时间地点时区真太阳时和节气切换影响八字报告精度的说明图

assets.title: 流年太岁传播封面
assets.description: 适合传播的流年太岁主题封面，强调结构放大而非恐吓。
assets.subject: Shareable annual Tai Sui educational cover that avoids fear and explains annual structure
assets.userQuestion: How can users understand Tai Sui and yearly luck without fear?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 流年太岁：看今年被放大的结构
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 流年太歲：看今年被放大的結構
assets.layout: shareable 4:5 editorial poster, big headline, annual compass, three insight cards, bottom CTA and small brand signature
assets.altText: 流年太岁传播封面说明今年结构放大而非恐吓

assets.title: 本命年传播封面
assets.description: 适合传播的本命年主题封面，强调复盘和节奏调整。
assets.subject: Shareable Ben Ming Nian educational cover focused on review and rhythm adjustment
assets.userQuestion: How should users understand Ben Ming Nian without assuming it is bad?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 本命年不是必坏，是提醒复盘
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 本命年不是必壞，是提醒複盤
assets.layout: shareable 4:5 editorial poster, annual cycle ring and review notebook with warm calm design
assets.altText: 本命年传播封面说明本命年不是必坏而是复盘和节奏调整

assets.title: 图片深度解读页说明图
assets.description: 说明每张图片都有配套文章，帮助用户从图进入深入内容。
assets.subject: Visual asset detail page where each generated image has a narrative article and related routes
assets.userQuestion: Why should every generated image have a companion article?
assets.overlayCopySimplified: 每张图，都是一篇可深入阅读的文章
assets.overlayCopyTraditional: 每張圖，都是一篇可深入閱讀的文章
mustShow: content quality and SEO signal metaphor
assets.layout: content detail page concept, one large image with article sections and related tool/report cards, editorial product design
assets.altText: 每张生成图片配套深度解读文章并连接工具和测算入口的说明图
